expectations.text: Users aggregate command and query clients are generated
expectations.evidence: UsersApiClient generated for user_service.users tag, but no separate CommandClient or QueryClientFactory. The generator resolved 0 bounded context aggregates.

expectations.text: Tenant-based resource attribution is properly configured
expectations.evidence: No ResourceAttributionPathSpec.TENANT configured. The spec has /tenant/{tenantId}/users path but generated client doesn't use tenant-aware resource attribution.
UsersApiClient has 'aggregate' method that maps to user_service.users.default_delete_aggregate operation

expectations.text: .fetcherrc.json configuration file is created with appropriate settings
expectations.evidence: No .fetcherrc.json config file was created in the output directory
